recommendations.title: Justice League
recommendations.overview: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne and Diana Prince assemble a team of metahumans consisting of Barry Allen, Arthur Curry and Victor Stone to face the catastrophic threat of Steppenwolf and
A story very loosely based the 480 B.C. Battle of Thermopylae, where the King of Sparta led his army against the advancing Persians.

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.

recommendations.title: Rebel Moon - Part One: A Child of Fire
recommendations.overview: When the ruthless forces of the Motherworld threaten a quiet farming village on a distant moon, a mysterious outsider becomes its best hope for survival.

recommendations.title: Legend of the Guardians: The Owls of Ga'Hoole
recommendations.overview: When a young owl is abducted by an evil Owl army, he must escape with new-found friends and seek the legendary Guardians to stop the menace.

recommendations.title: Rebel Moon - Part Two: The Scargiver
recommendations.overview: The rebels gear up for battle against the ruthless forces of the Motherworld as unbreakable bonds are forged, heroes emerge — and legends are made.

recommendations.title: Watchmen

recommendations.title: Man of Steel
recommendations.overview: A young boy learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this earth. As a young man, he journeys to discover where he came from and what he was sent here to do. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and

recommendations.title: Sucker Punch
recommendations.overview: A young woman, institutionalized by her abusive stepfather, retreats into a vivid fantasy world where she envisions a plan to escape. Gathering a group of fellow inmates, she embarks on a quest to collect five mystical items, blurring the lines betwe

recommendations.title: Army of the Dead
recommendations.overview: Following a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries take the ultimate gamble: venturing into the quarantine zone to pull off the greatest heist ever attempted.
